steps.title: Translate the relationship
steps.content: Let $w$ be the width of the rectangle in feet. The length is $87$ times the width, so length $=87w$ feet.

steps.title: Confirm using the area formula
steps.content: Area of a rectangle is length times width: $y=(\text{length})(\text{width})=(87w)(w)$. Comparing this to the given $y=(87w)(w)$ confirms that the factor $w$ is the width and $87w$ is the length.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A) The length of the rectangle, in feet. This equals $87w$ by the relationship stated in the problem.
  • B) The area of the rectangle, in square feet. The area is $y=(87w)(w)$, not $87w$ alone.
  • C) The difference between the length and the width. That would be $87w-w=86w$, not $87w$.
  • D) The width of the rectangle, in feet. The width is $w$, not $87w$. That confirms A is correct.
